pageContext.name: Dark Trooper
pageContext.description: Series 2 of The Mandalorian Geeki Tikis® have arrived!  This time around, you can choose to drink with fan-favorites Ahsoka Tano, Bo-Katan Kryze, or a Dark Trooper, all of whom made their live-action appearances in Season 2 of the Disney+ series The Mandalorian.   The Geeki Tikis® The Mandalorian Dark Trooper Mug holds 18 ounces of your favorite beverage and stands an impressive 7.5 tall. Undeniably the most menacing of our Stormtrooper Geeki Tikis® to date, the Dark Trooper features a glossy black glaze with glowing red eyes and a contrasting interior.   This is the Way… to tropical refreshment, Star Wars style!
